findings.description: The page contains a decorative monitor icon (Lesson 11-01 badge) and a ruler/pen icon in the top-right corner. These are UI chrome elements with no semantic content and are correctly omitted from the release.

reviewer_notes: Seven entities comprehensively cover this lesson-opener page: section header 11-01, the animal-illustration callout box (大きさが重要) as figure::1, the ハードウェア intro term, sub-section header, and three concept terms (コンピュータの種類, コンピュータの大きさ, 境界線が曖昧). All jp surfaces match the image text faithfully; zh/en translations are accurate and read naturally. The figure::1 caption correctly reproduces the full animal-comparison analogy text.
